name: atlassian-mcp
description: Bridge to Atlassian Jira and Confluence via the mcp-atlassian MCP server — search issues, read pages, manage tickets and wiki content.
author: renre-kit

actions.name: call-tool
actions.description: Invoke an Atlassian MCP tool by name

actions.name: read-resource
actions.description: Read a specific Atlassian MCP resource by URI

actions.name: get-issue
actions.description: Get a single Jira issue by key

actions.name: get-comments
actions.description: Get comments on a Jira issue

actions.name: add-comment
actions.description: Add a comment to a Jira issue

actions.name: chat-search-issues
actions.description: Chat tool: search Jira issues by JQL

actions.name: chat-get-issue
actions.description: Chat tool: get a Jira issue by key

actions.name: chat-get-issue-comments
actions.description: Chat tool: get comments on a Jira issue

actions.name: chat-add-comment
actions.description: Chat tool: add a comment to a Jira issue

actions.name: chat-create-issue
actions.description: Chat tool: create a new Jira issue

actions.name: chat-update-issue
actions.description: Chat tool: update fields on a Jira issue

actions.name: chat-transition-issue
actions.description: Chat tool: transition a Jira issue status

actions.name: chat-assign-issue
actions.description: Chat tool: assign a Jira issue

actions.name: chat-get-transitions
actions.description: Chat tool: list available transitions for an issue

schema.label: Atlassian Email
schema.description: Email address associated with your Atlassian account.

skills.name: atlassian-query
skills.description: Teaches LLMs how to query Jira issues, Confluence pages, and other Atlassian resources via renre-kit query.

chatTools.name: search-issues
chatTools.description: Search Jira issues using JQL (Jira Query Language). Returns matching issues with summary, status, assignee, priority, and labels.

jql.description: JQL query string (e.g. 'project = MYPROJ AND status = "In Progress"'). If omitted, returns recently updated issues.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 20, max 100).

chatTools.name: get-issue
chatTools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Jira issue including summary, status, assignee, priority, labels, description, components, and fix versions.

chatTools.name: get-issue-comments
chatTools.description: Get comments on a Jira issue, ordered by creation date.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of comments to return (default 50, max 100).

chatTools.name: add-comment
chatTools.description: Add a comment to a Jira issue.

chatTools.name: create-issue
chatTools.description: Create a new Jira issue in a project.

labels.description: Labels to apply to the issue.

assigneeAccountId.description: Atlassian account ID of the assignee. Use search-users to find account IDs.

chatTools.name: update-issue
chatTools.description: Update fields on an existing Jira issue. Only specified fields are changed.

labels.description: New set of labels (replaces existing labels).

assigneeAccountId.description: Atlassian account ID of the new assignee.

chatTools.name: transition-issue
chatTools.description: Change a Jira issue's status by performing a workflow transition (e.g. 'To Do' → 'In Progress' → 'Done'). Use get-transitions to see available transitions first.

transitionName.description: Name of the transition to perform (e.g. 'Start Progress', 'Done'). Case-insensitive.

chatTools.name: get-transitions
chatTools.description: List available workflow transitions for a Jira issue. Shows what status changes are possible from the issue's current status.

chatTools.name: assign-issue
chatTools.description: Assign a Jira issue to a user, or unassign it by omitting accountId.

accountId.description: Atlassian account ID of the user to assign. Omit to unassign.

chatTools.name: search-users
chatTools.description: Search for Jira users by name or email. Returns account IDs needed for assign-issue and create-issue.

query.description: Search query — matches against user display name and email.

chatTools.name: get-myself
chatTools.description: Get the currently authenticated Jira user's profile (display name, email, account ID).

chatAgents.name: jira-assistant
chatAgents.description: An AI assistant specialized in Jira project management — search issues, create tickets, manage workflows, and track project progress.
chatAgents.prompt: You are a Jira project management assistant. Help the user search for issues, create and update tickets, manage workflows, and track project progress. When searching issues, use JQL syntax. When creating issues, ask for project key and issue type if not provided. When transitioning issues, check available transitions first. Always confirm destructive or status-changing actions before executing them.
